sentence_reviews.text: Resolution and receptive field are changed by grouping, subsampling, or reconstructing spatial units.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning supports convolution, pooling, and spatial hierarchy background.
sentence_reviews.notes: The definition is consistent with pooling/striding/up-downsampling; patchification is newer and would need a more specific source for verified.

sentence_reviews.text: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Images, video & spatial grids, Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: Striding, pooling, patchification & up/downsampling is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Convolution & local filters.

sentence_reviews.notes: Striding/pooling often appear in convolutional architectures, though patchification is not necessarily convolutional.
